evals.name: medium-feature-artifacts
evals.prompt: In a target repo, shape card INV-21 for adding CSV export to an existing invoice list. Requirement is clear, size M, canonical verification is `make test`, workspace is `dir:/work/invoice-app`, and unrelated invoice creation must not change. Return proposed artifact paths and concise contents for every artifact needed for a build-ready handoff to ginb. Do not write code.
evals.expected_output: A docs/briefs brief, docs/plans plan, and thin Kanban card with clear boundaries, observable acceptance, real workspace, and no unnecessary spec or ADR.
expectations: Does not create a spec or ADR without decision value
Brief owns objective, bounded scope, non-goals, and observable acceptance
Plan contains ordered targets, changes, verification evidence, and requirement traceability
Kanban card stays thin and records dir:/work/invoice-app plus artifact links

evals.name: risky-contract-artifacts
evals.prompt: Shape SEC-9 for replacing session cookies with rotating refresh tokens across web and mobile clients. This is L/risky work. Requirements include backward-compatible migration, token theft detection, rollback, audit logging, and no forced logout during rollout. Workspace is `worktree`; canonical checks are `make verify`. No architecture owner has approved a storage strategy. Return artifact paths and concise content needed before build dispatch. Do not implement.
evals.expected_output: Brief, spec, plan, proposed ADR, and thin card under docs/, covering contracts, failure/security/migration/rollback semantics without inventing architecture approval.
expectations: Places brief, spec, plan, and ADR under docs/ and links them from card
Spec covers compatibility, security, failures, migration, rollback, observability, and behavioral acceptance
Plan orders discovery or decision before implementation and includes make verify evidence
ADR status remains proposed and compares viable storage alternatives
Does not claim architecture approval or silently choose an accepted storage strategy

evals.name: unknown-facts-investigation
evals.prompt: Prepare PAY-42: make payment webhook processing idempotent. Provider, repository path, event identifier contract, retry response semantics, persistence technology, and canonical verification command are unknown. Gin asks whether this is ready for direct build and wants the smallest safe artifact set and next action. Return readiness decision, artifact paths, and artifact content. Do not invent missing facts.
evals.expected_output: Not-ready investigation-first response, docs/briefs and docs/plans artifacts with owned TBD blockers, no invented provider/repo/commands/contracts, and thin card only if safe workspace can be supplied.
expectations: Rejects direct build and routes investigation first
Marks unknown material facts as TBD with owner or blocking decision
Does not invent repository paths, verification commands, provider behavior, or implementation technology
Defines observable investigation outcomes and exact next action
